title: Verification-domain certificate profiles for finite multi-objective optimisation
description: Exact rational verification-domain profiles, minimum-budget certificates, structured separation oracles, exact augmented-Chebyshev intervals and retained computational evidence for positive scalarisation certificates in finite multi-objective optimisation. Version 2.0.0 is a major reconstruction of the earlier diagnostic companion software. Source code is licensed under BSD-3-Clause. Retained instances, proof objects, results, figures and prose documentation are licensed under CC BY 4.0. Independent physical-machine replication is not claimed by this archive; exact classifications and proof-object replay are validated by the included scripts.
